reforms.description: Italy's national guaranteed minimum income program, introduced in 2018, aims to support households based on income and assets, while also evaluating the effectiveness of environmental regulations to boost competition and innovation. This initiative is part of a broader effort to enhance support for innovative firms and improve tax outcomes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The program aims to reduce poverty and stimulate economic activity, which can enhance overall productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The national guaranteed minimum income program has been fully operational since its introduction.
reforms.importance_rationale: While the minimum income program is a significant reform, it is not as transformative as a major overhaul of the innovation system.
reforms.source_quote: Higher public funding for low-carbon R&D would have substantial economic benefits, because innovation can be applied across a broad range of sectors and tends to have substantial knowledge spillovers for domestic firms.

reforms.description: Italy's Digital Transformation Team was established to accelerate the implementation of the government's digital agenda, focusing on developing digital platforms for public administration interactions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital platforms for public administration is expected to improve efficiency and accessibility, fostering innovation in public services.
reforms.status_evidence: The Digital Transformation Team has been operational since its establishment.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the Digital Transformation Team is a significant step but does not represent a major overhaul of the innovation system.
reforms.source_quote: Italy’s Digital Transformation Team is an agency created in 2016 on a temporary basis to accelerate the implementation of the government’s digital agenda.

reforms.description: The 2012 Start-up Act has been instrumental in improving access to finance for innovative entrepreneurial activity by providing government guarantees against bank borrowing, thereby reducing collateral needs and loan costs for start-ups.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating access to finance, the Start-up Act encourages innovation and entrepreneurship, which can lead to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Start-up Act has been fully operational since its introduction.
reforms.importance_rationale: The Start-up Act represents a major reform in supporting innovative firms and enhancing the startup ecosystem in Italy.
reforms.source_quote: The 2012 Start-up Act is improving access to finance and reenergising innovative entrepreneurial activity.

reforms.description: In 2018, a new public-private fund, Italia Venture II, was established with EUR 150 million in seed funds from the government to invest in innovative start-ups and SMEs in southern regions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to enhance investment in innovative firms, which can stimulate economic growth and job creation in southern regions.
reforms.status_evidence: The Italia Venture II Fund has been operational since its establishment.
reforms.importance_rationale: While the fund is significant for regional development, it is not as transformative as the Start-up Act.
reforms.source_quote: A new public-private fund (Italia Venture II) was established in 2018 with EUR 150 million seed funds from the government to invest in innovative start-ups and SMEs in southern regions.

reforms.description: The 2019 budget law introduced a Venture Capital Support Fund with a yearly allocation of EUR 30 million for the 2019-2021 period, allowing government participation in venture capital funds.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of the Venture Capital Support Fund is expected to enhance investment in innovative firms, fostering entrepreneurship and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Venture Capital Support Fund has been operational since its introduction in the 2019 budget law.
reforms.importance_rationale: While the fund is important for supporting startups, it is not a major reform compared to the Start-up Act.
reforms.source_quote: The 2019 budget law introduced the possibility for the government to participate in venture capital funds.
